# Data files (too large for git — download separately)
data/
*.smi
*.sdf

# Outputs (regenerated by running the notebook)
outputs/
*.xlsx

# Model files (regenerated by running the notebook)
models/
*.pkl

# Jupyter checkpoints
.ipynb_checkpoints/
__pycache__/

# Python
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.egg-info/
dist/
build/
.env
venv/
env/

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# IDE
.vscode/
.idea/
